mapper.insert:
SELECT EXPENSES_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO EXPENSES ( expense_id, group_id, paid_by, amount, merchant_name, category, receipt_image_url ) VALUES ( #{expenseId}, #{groupId}, #{paidBy}, #{amount}, #{merchantName}, #{category}, #{fileName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT expense_id AS expenseId, merchant_name AS merchantName, category, amount, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS payDate, receipt_image_url AS receiptImageUrl FROM EXPENSES WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT item_name AS itemName, price, quantity FROM RECEIPT_ITEMS WHERE expense_id = #{expenseId} AND status = 'INCLUDED' ORDER BY item_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TRANSACTIONS SET EXPENSE_ID = NULL WHERE EXPENSE_ID = #{expenseId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM EXPENSES WHERE EXPENSE_ID = #{expenseId} AND PAID_BY = #{userId}
